summary: Systematically improve conversion rates through heuristic analysis, A/B test design, and data-driven optimization.

inputs.name: current_performance
inputs.description: Baseline conversion rate and funnel data.

inputs.name: page_or_funnel_url
inputs.description: URL of the page or funnel to optimize.

outputs.name: cro_audit
outputs.description: Heuristic analysis of current page or funnel performance.

outputs.name: test_hypotheses
outputs.description: Prioritized list of testable hypotheses with expected impact.

outputs.name: optimization_roadmap
outputs.description: Phased testing plan with timeline and success criteria.

budget.notes: Focus on data-driven hypotheses and measurable outcomes.

gates.rule: Confirm the request is conversion optimization rather than traffic generation or SEO.
Require conversion goal and baseline performance data.
Deliver audit with prioritized hypotheses and testing roadmap.

steps.action: Analyze funnel data, drop-off points, and user behavior patterns.
Evaluate pages using clarity, relevance, urgency, and distraction frameworks.
Generate testable hypotheses ranked by impact, ease, and confidence.
Create phased testing plan with sample sizes and success criteria.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read analytics data, heatmaps, and user research.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Produce CRO audit and optimization roadmap.

verification.method: Check current conversion rate and funnel metrics are documented.
Check each hypothesis references specific data evidence.
Check test plan includes sample size, duration, and success criteria.

success_criteria: CRO audit identifies key conversion barriers.
Testing roadmap provides clear next steps with expected impact.

rollback.when: If baseline data is insufficient, revert to data collection step.
